_schema: Agent progress log — DO NOT delete entries, only append or update status fields.
_instructions: Each session appends one entry to `sessions`. Each task completion updates the corresponding task in `task_status`. Read this file FIRST in every session.

2a.title: Extend TriggerRequest model with levers field

2b.title: Wire levers through trigger route → do_start_optimization → submit_optimization

2c.title: Add lever checkboxes to space detail page

1b.title: Add config constants for UC model registration

1a.title: Add register_uc_model() and call from finalize

1d.title: Create and link deployment job programmatically

1e.title: Add deploy_target parameter to frontend trigger flow

1f.title: Show deployment job status in run detail page

3b.title: Integrate stepper into space detail page

4b.title: Extend strategist output schema for proposals

4c.title: Write proposals to state table during lever loop

4d.title: Add backend API endpoints for suggestions

4e.title: Add suggestions UI to run detail page

4f.title: Implement metric view creation from accepted suggestion

4g.title: Implement function creation from accepted suggestion

sessions.summary: Added `levers: list[int] | None = None` field to TriggerRequest in models.py. When None, backend will treat as all levers [1,2,3,4,5]. Single-line change, zero linter errors.

Wired levers through the full call chain: trigger.py passes body.levers to do_start_optimization, spaces.py accepts new levers param, resolves None to DEFAULT_LEVER_ORDER, serialises to JSON string, and passes to submit_optimization. job_launcher.py already accepted the param — not modified.

Added lever checkboxes to space detail page. Added Checkbox shadcn component, LEVERS constant (5 items), selectedLevers state with toggleLever handler, collapsible checkbox UI between apply-mode toggle and Start button, levers payload in doStartOptimization (undefined when all selected), and disabled button when zero levers selected.

Added GET /api/genie/levers endpoint returning lever metadata. Created LeverInfo(id, name, description) Pydantic model in models.py. Added list_levers() route in trigger.py with operation_id='listLevers'. Reads LEVER_NAMES from config.py and pairs with hardcoded descriptions.

Added three config constants in config.py after MODEL_NAME_TEMPLATE: UC_REGISTERED_MODEL_TEMPLATE (3-level UC model name pattern), ENABLE_UC_MODEL_REGISTRATION (bool flag, default True), and DEPLOYMENT_JOB_NAME_TEMPLATE (per-space deployment job name pattern). All use {{ variable }} syntax compatible with format_mlflow_template().

Added register_uc_model() function to models.py — reads best_model_id from run state, builds 3-level UC model name via UC_REGISTERED_MODEL_TEMPLATE, calls mlflow.register_model() with databricks-uc registry, sets @champion alias via MlflowClient. Guarded by ENABLE_UC_MODEL_REGISTRATION flag. Called from harness.py _run_finalize() immediately after promote_best_model(). Fire-and-forget — failure does not block the run.

Created run_cross_env_deploy.py Databricks notebook in jobs/. Follows existing notebook pattern (dbutils.widgets, _banner/_log helpers, COMMAND separators). Reads model_name, model_version, target_workspace_url, target_space_id from widgets. Loads space_config.json from MLflow UC registry artifacts, connects to target workspace via WorkspaceClient(host=target_url), applies config via patch_space_config(), and tags model version with deploy status.

Added ensure_deployment_job() to job_launcher.py — finds or creates a per-space deployment job (named via DEPLOYMENT_JOB_NAME_TEMPLATE) running run_cross_env_deploy notebook with model_name/version/target_workspace_url/target_space_id params. Added run_cross_env_deploy to _NOTEBOOK_SOURCES so it gets uploaded. Updated register_uc_model() to accept optional ws param; when provided, calls ensure_deployment_job() and links via client.update_registered_model(deployment_job_id=...). Updated harness.py to pass ws=w. All deployment job linking is fire-and-forget (non-fatal).

Added deploy_target to the full trigger flow. TriggerRequest gets deploy_target: str | None = None. Wired through trigger.py → do_start_optimization → submit_optimization (which previously hardcoded deploy_target to empty string). Frontend adds a collapsible 'Deployment target (optional)' text input below lever checkboxes, passes deploy_target in mutation data. When empty/omitted, deploy step is skipped as before.

Added deploymentJobStatus and deploymentJobUrl fields to PipelineRun model. Added _resolve_deployment_status() helper in runs.py that scans DEPLOY_* stage rows to derive status (SKIPPED/RUNNING/DEPLOYED/FAILED) and deploy_target URL. Frontend shows a color-coded DeploymentBadge (with Rocket icon) next to the run status in the header — green for DEPLOYED (clickable link to target workspace), blue+spinner for RUNNING, red for FAILED, muted for SKIPPED.

Completed all three tasks for Feature 3. 3c: tw-animate-css already installed — no new deps needed. 3a: Created OptimizationLoadingStepper component with 5-step animated dialog (Validating → Preparing → Submitting → Launching → Started). Steps auto-advance on 800ms timers, show Loader2 spinner while active and CheckCircle on completion. isComplete fast-forwards to final step then calls onNavigate after 800ms. Errors show XCircle with message and Dismiss button. 3b: Integrated into $spaceId.tsx — stepper opens on doStartOptimization(), completes on API success (then auto-navigates to run page), shows error on failure. Dialog added shadcn component.

Added TABLE_SUGGESTIONS constant to config.py. Added _GENIE_OPT_SUGGESTIONS_DDL in state.py with columns: suggestion_id, run_id, space_id, iteration, lever, type (METRIC_VIEW|FUNCTION), title, rationale, definition, affected_questions (JSON), estimated_impact, status (PROPOSED|ACCEPTED|REJECTED|IMPLEMENTED), reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at. Registered in _ALL_DDL so ensure_optimization_tables() creates it automatically. Added three CRUD functions: write_suggestion(), load_suggestions(run_id), update_suggestion_status(suggestion_id, status, reviewed_by).

Extended STRATEGIST_DETAIL_PROMPT with proposals support. Added 'Contract: Improvement Proposals' instruction section explaining when to propose METRIC_VIEW vs FUNCTION. Added 'proposals' array to the output_schema JSON (type, title, rationale, definition, affected_questions, estimated_impact). Updated example output with empty proposals array. Added rule marking proposals as OPTIONAL. In optimizer.py: _call_llm_for_ag_detail now parses proposals from LLM response and includes in return dict (with [] fallback on all error paths). _generate_holistic_strategy passes proposals through to assembled action groups. Telemetry span includes proposals_count.

Added write_suggestion import to harness.py. After AG_STARTED stage is written in _run_lever_loop, added block that extracts proposals from the selected action group and writes each to the genie_opt_suggestions Delta table via write_suggestion(). Each proposal is tagged with run_id, space_id, iteration, and fields from the strategist (type, title, rationale, definition, affected_questions, estimated_impact). Failures are caught per-proposal to avoid breaking the lever loop.

Added SuggestionOut and SuggestionReviewRequest Pydantic models to models.py. Created routes/suggestions.py with three endpoints: GET /runs/{run_id}/suggestions (lists all suggestions for a run), POST /suggestions/{suggestion_id}/review (accept/reject with reviewer tracking), POST /suggestions/{suggestion_id}/apply (executes SQL definition via Statement Execution API then marks IMPLEMENTED). Added load_suggestion_by_id helper to state.py for single-suggestion lookup. Registered suggestions router in app.py.

Created SuggestionsPanel.tsx component that fetches suggestions via useGetImprovementSuggestionsSuspense and renders each as a card with type badge (METRIC_VIEW/FUNCTION), title, rationale, SQL definition preview, impact info, and action buttons. Accept/Reject buttons call reviewSuggestion mutation; Apply button (visible after acceptance) calls applySuggestion mutation. Both invalidate the query cache on settle. Added 'Suggestions' tab with Lightbulb icon to the run detail page ($runId.tsx), wrapped in ErrorBoundary + Suspense.
